text:
·˚✿ POLLINATIONS WEEKLY ✿˚·
vol. 42 — model musical chairs and API sanity.

13 PRs merged this week. mostly playing musical chairs with model providers and fixing things that should have been obvious.

───

→ MUSICAL CHAIRS
moved Wan and Qwen image/video generation off Alibaba to Replicate and OpenRouter. added claude fable 5 on bedrock and kimi k2.7 code. we keep the endpoints stable while the backend providers shuffle.

→ API SANITY
content policy rejections now return a 422 instead of a 500. because you asking for something blocked shouldn't look like the server caught fire. also fixed boolean query params parsing on text routes.

→ UI & NO-BUILD
shipped a single-accent theme with canonical tokens. the dashboard now uses the live model catalog. plus, we added a @pollinations/ui browser bundle for no-build setups.

→ COMMUNITY
made Websim BYOP compliant and added Wikimind to the learn section.

everything is open source. build something weird at pollinations.ai

#OpenSource #AI #WebDev #APIs
